text:
gdb says "no debugging symbols found"

[lepis@lepis ~]$ cat /usr/src/sys/i386/conf/lepis | grep DEBUG
makeoptions DEBUG=-g #...
options USB_DEBUG
options IEEE80211_DEBUG #....
options USB_DEBUG #....
